violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A waste receptacle was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in front servcie area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Shelf located inside Traulsen cooler noted not in good repair.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil (scoop) for ice noted stored in an unprotected location on top ice machine.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling light covers and vent covers noted n need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside small milk cooler near front service window noted in need of routine cleaning.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): No disposable towels present near back hand-washing lavatory.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling light cover over drive-thru window needs cleaning. Wall and floor area near back door needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wire shelving inside Traulsen cooler noted not in good repair. New door seal needed on walkin freezer door.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service cups noted being stored on floor.
